name: Cypress Golf
about: Cypress Golf is a neighborhood golf simulator venue in Plantation, Florida, featuring three simulator bays with Pro Tee Technology for up to four players per bay. The venue offers a relaxed, community-focused environment where friends, families, and neighbors of all skill levels can connect and play. Operating with member-only access seven days a week, it also provides public hours on Fridays, Saturdays, and Sundays, along with a lounge setting featuring TVs, a pool table, and a full bar serving beer, wine, and non-alcoholic beverages.
why_golfers_like_it: 3 bays on Pro Tee Technology offer realistic gameplay and detailed analytics
Family-friendly environment with lounge-style seating, TVs, and a pool table
BYOF policy and on-site bar with beer, wine, and non-alcoholic options

food_and_drink.notes: Food is BYOF or order through partner, Gianna's Italian
Full bar offering beer, wine, hard seltzers, and non-alcoholic drinks

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: You can bring your own food, but outside drinks are not allowed. However, you can purchase from their selection of beer, wine, non-alcoholic beverages, and coffee.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: Booking is on the hour for a minimum of 60 minutes. For 1-2 players, expect about 1 hour, while 3-4 players will need 2-3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and encourages kids of all ages to play. Minors must be accompanied by an adult at all times.
